leadText: Shadow Bolt (Japanese: ダークサンダー Dark Thunder) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Shadow Pokémon is purified. It is the signature move of Shadow Zapdos.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Bolt is a Shadow version of Thunderbolt . It deals damage and has a 10% chance of inflicting paralysis on the target. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Bolt cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy thunder attack that may paralyze.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Bolt is the only Shadow move that can cause paralysis .
